title: Chief Financial Officer (CFO)
description:
We are seeking an experienced Chief Financial Officer (CFO) to lead and oversee the full spectrum of financial operations across Singapore and Hong Kong. This is a senior leadership role responsible for financial strategy, governance, compliance, and systems transformation to support the Company’s regional growth.

The CFO will work closely with senior management and regional teams to ensure strong financial controls, accurate reporting, and scalable finance processes.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead and oversee end-to-end finance operations for Singapore and Hong Kong entities
  • Manage and mentor the Singapore and Hong Kong finance teams, including accountants and finance executives
  • Oversee financial reporting, budgeting, forecasting, and cash flow management across regions
  • Ensure full compliance with Singapore and Hong Kong statutory, tax, audit, and regulatory requirements
  • Act as the key liaison with auditors, tax agents, banks, and regulatory authorities
  • Drive financial strategy, cost optimisation, and profitability improvement initiatives
  • Oversee and support the finance system transformation, including:
  • Current use of QuickBooks
  • Transition to Salesforce-integrated finance systems
  • Establish and strengthen internal controls, SOPs, and governance frameworks
  • Provide timely financial insights and analysis to support business decision-making
  • Support regional expansion, restructuring, or new business initiatives as required

Job Requirements

  • Singapore Citizen (role requires deep familiarity with Singapore regulatory frameworks and frequent interaction with local authorities)
  • Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, Business, or a related field
  • Professional qualification such as CA, CPA, ACCA, or equivalent is strongly preferred
  • Minimum 10–15 years of progressive finance experience, including:
  • Senior leadership or Head of Finance / CFO-level exposure
  • Regional finance management experience covering multiple entities or countries
  • Strong working knowledge of:
  • Singapore and Hong Kong accounting standards and tax regulations
  • Statutory reporting, audits, and compliance requirements
  • Hands-on experience with QuickBooks and involvement in finance system migration or ERP/CRM integration (Salesforce experience is an advantage)
  • Proven ability to lead teams, manage stakeholders, and work with senior management
  • Strong analytical, strategic thinking, and communication skills
  • Ability to work in a fast-paced, growth-oriented environment

postedCompany.description:
Founded in 2007, Apex Retail brings premium international skincare brands to prestigious Asian markets. Over the years, we expanded extensively on our product offerings, retail channels as well as our growing team to meet the ever-changing needs and demands of the market. To ensure our products and services quality, each of the brands undergoes careful selections from the most exclusive international sources for their luxurious, unique, and effective ingredients which differentiates us from our competitors. Building high-end retail concept stores at premium locations further aid in developing brand values that attract customers and their loyalty.


Apex Retail also prided itself in its first-class customer service with the highest customer satisfaction guaranteed. We house a strong team of customer service officers who specializes in handling all customer inquiries, needs, and expectations. The combination of top-quality products and customer service has brought the company to where it is today - a successful luxury beauty and skincare retailer in Asia, with over 140 employees across Singapore and Hong Kong!


We believe in establishing a long and successful journey with our team members, taking the company and each other to new heights.  Therefore, we train and support the team and make efforts to make the company a place where everyone can thrive.


What are you waiting for? Click Apply to join and be a part of Singapore's TOP Leading Retailer Group!


Would you like to hear more from us? Click on the link below:

https://www.apexretail.com.sg/get-to-know-us
postedCompany.name: APEX RETAIL PTE. LTD.
